name: soccer-manager cloud dev
install: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@11.1.2 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium
start: service docker start || true; docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --wait surrealdb; pnpm db:migrate

terminals.name: dev
terminals.description: Starts the TanStack web app on port 3000.

terminals.name: surrealdb logs
terminals.description: Streams logs from the SurrealDB service started by the cloud start command.
